name: Root Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in 1/2 cup warm water.
2. In a separate container, dissolve the granulated sugar in 1 quart hot water.
3. Combine the dissolved yeast and sugar solutions.
4. Add the root beer extract to the mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a gallon jar.
6. Fill the jar with warm water, ensuring all ingredients are well mixed.
7. Cover the jar and set it in a warm place for 4 hours.
8. The root beer will be ready to drink the next day. Chill before serving.
